name: Aker Clean Hydrogen AS
summary: Aker Clean Hydrogen AS develops, builds, owns, and operates clean hydrogen production facilities in Norway. It holds a portfolio of nine clean hydrogen projects and prospects with a total net capacity of 1.3 GW under development; and additional pipeline and opportunities of 4.7 GW. The company is based in Lysaker, Norway. Aker Clean Hydrogen AS is a subsidiary of Aker Horizons AS.
